title: HO&RPG
body:
# The Hard and Optimized RPG

This modpack includes 
- attributes to do stuff 
- classes 
- origins 
- bosses 
- really cool climate 
- a temperature mod 
- a body damage system 
- dehydration 
- tons of structure
- lots of cool swords and armor
- optimization mods
- early stage
- herobrine
- and more!

All there to hopefully live up to its name.
I hopefully will be updating this modpack to make it better for you peoples!
